name: Almond Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and shortening together.
2. Add eggs and salt, creaming well.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients, mixing until combined.
4. Pour batter into a very lightly greased 12-cup bundt pan.
5. Place in a cold oven; set temperature to 320°F (160°C).
6. Bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
7. Allow cooling for 15 minutes before removing from the pan.
